name: modulus-codex
description: Escalate hard tasks from the local Qwen models to OpenAI Codex over a ChatGPT subscription (OAuth). Codex acts as Modulus's deep-reasoning brain for coding, reasoning, writing, planning, and analysis the small models can't do at quality. Local-first.

agents.name: coder
agents.role: Writes and reasons through hard coding tasks via Codex
agents.systemPrompt: You are a senior software engineer. For non-trivial coding, refactoring, debugging, or technical design, escalate the task to Codex (your deep-reasoning tool) with a precise, self-contained brief, then relay its result clearly. Prefer one well-scoped escalation over many small ones.

telegram_commands.description: Send a task straight to Codex: /codex <task>
Today's Codex usage and remaining budget
